chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-705 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.2872/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2873/2025. 4. For orders on M.A. No.2874/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 12.11.2025 Mr. Abbas Ali Abbasi, advocate for petitioner. == 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to5. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he does not wish to press the instant petition as the matter pertains to the fiscal jurisdiction in view of the Notification No.Gaz/Const./Company Bench Karachi, dated the 11th August 2025, therefore, seeks permission to file the same before the Principal Seat at Karachi. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
